title: Dishisvara Siva Temple
tagline: Dishisvara Siva Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Dishiswar Shiva Temple is located in Bhubaneswar, Orissa, India.
overview.description: Dishiswar Shiva Temple is located in Bhubaneswar, Orissa, India. The presiding deity is a Shiva-lingam within a circular yoni pitha installed inside the sanctum.

topPlaces.name: Begunia
topPlaces.description: Begunia is a Town of Khordha district and a Notified Area Council (NAC) of the Indian state of Odisha. Begunia is situated approximately 45 KM away from Bhubaneswar, 18 KM away from the district headquarters, Khordha, and 14 KM away from Rajsunakhala.

topPlaces.name: Baghamari
topPlaces.description: Baghamari is a village located in the Western part of Khordha district in the Indian state of Odisha. The population is more than 20,000.

topPlaces.name: Chhanagiri
topPlaces.description: Chhanagiri is a village and Gram panchayat located in the Jankia Tehsil of Khordha district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is situated approximately 24 kilometres (15 mi) from the district headquarters in Khordha and falls under the jurisdiction of the Jankia police station.

items.note: Begunia is a Town of Khordha district and a Notified Area Council (NAC) of the Indian state of Odisha. Begunia is situated approximately 45 KM away from Bhubaneswar, 18 KM away from the district headquarters, Khordha, and 14 KM away from Rajsunakhala.
Baghamari is a village located in the Western part of Khordha district in the Indian state of Odisha. The population is more than 20,000.

Chhanagiri is a village and Gram panchayat located in the Jankia Tehsil of Khordha district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is situated approximately 24 kilometres (15 mi) from the district headquarters in Khordha and falls under the jurisdiction of the Jankia police station.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dishisvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dishisvara Siva Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dishisvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (35 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dishisvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dishisvara Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dishisvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Dishisvara Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dishisvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Begunia, Baghamari, Chhanagiri.
